name: AuRico Metals Inc.
description: AuRico Metals Inc. is a Canada-based mining development and royalty company. The company's primary development asset is the 100% owned Kemess gold-copper project in British Columbia, Canada. In addition, AuRico Metals holds a high-quality portfolio of gold royalties on producing mines and development projects, including a 1.5% net smelter return royalty on the Young-Davidson gold mine in Ontario and a 2.0% net smelter return royalty on the Fosterville gold mine in Australia.
